result.preview: "SQLite query execution error (DatabaseError): Execution failed on sql 'SELECT Patents_info, REPLACE(SUBSTR(Patents_info, INSTR(Patents_info, \"publication_number:'\"), INSTR(Patents_info, \"',\") - INSTR(Patents_info, \"publication_number:'\")), \"publication_number:'\", \"\") AS publication_number, cpc FROM publication_database.publicationinfo WHERE Patents_info LIKE '%assignee_harmonized:'UNIV CALIFORNIA'%';': near \"UNIV\": syntax error"

args.query: SELECT Patents_info, REPLACE(SUBSTR(Patents_info, INSTR(Patents_info, "publication_number:'"), INSTR(Patents_info, "',") - INSTR(Patents_info, "publication_number:'")), "publication_number:'", "") AS publication_number, cpc FROM publication_database.publicationinfo WHERE Patents_info LIKE '%assignee_harmonized:'UNIV CALIFORNIA'%';

exec_args.sql: SELECT Patents_info, REPLACE(SUBSTR(Patents_info, INSTR(Patents_info, "publication_number:'"), INSTR(Patents_info, "',") - INSTR(Patents_info, "publication_number:'")), "publication_number:'", "") AS publication_number, cpc FROM publication_database.publicationinfo WHERE Patents_info LIKE '%assignee_harmonized:'UNIV CALIFORNIA'%';

result.preview: "SQLite query execution error (DatabaseError): Execution failed on sql 'SELECT Patents_info, REPLACE(SUBSTR(Patents_info, INSTR(Patents_info, \"publication_number:'\") + LENGTH(\"publication_number:'\"), INSTR(Patents_info, \"',\", INSTR(Patents_info, \"publication_number:'\") + LENGTH(\"publication_number:'\"))) - (INSTR(Patents_info, \"publication_number:'\") + LENGTH(\"publication_number:'\"))), \"'\", \"\") AS publication_number, cpc, citation FROM publication_database.publicationinfo WHERE Patents_info LIKE '%assignee_harmonized:''UNIV CALIFORNIA''%';': near \")\": syntax error"

args.query: SELECT Patents_info, REPLACE(SUBSTR(Patents_info, INSTR(Patents_info, "publication_number:'") + LENGTH("publication_number:'"), INSTR(Patents_info, "',", INSTR(Patents_info, "publication_number:'") + LENGTH("publication_number:'"))) - (INSTR(Patents_info, "publication_number:'") + LENGTH("publication_number:'"))), "'", "") AS publication_number, cpc, citation FROM publication_database.publicationinfo WHERE Patents_info LIKE '%assignee_harmonized:''UNIV CALIFORNIA''%';

exec_args.sql: SELECT Patents_info, REPLACE(SUBSTR(Patents_info, INSTR(Patents_info, "publication_number:'") + LENGTH("publication_number:'"), INSTR(Patents_info, "',", INSTR(Patents_info, "publication_number:'") + LENGTH("publication_number:'"))) - (INSTR(Patents_info, "publication_number:'") + LENGTH("publication_number:'"))), "'", "") AS publication_number, cpc, citation FROM publication_database.publicationinfo WHERE Patents_info LIKE '%assignee_harmonized:''UNIV CALIFORNIA''%';

args.query: SELECT Patents_info, cpc, citation FROM publicationinfo WHERE Patents_info LIKE '%assignee_harmonized:''UNIV CALIFORNIA''%';
